card.name: Matsuyoi-Reflecting Slash
card.text: Destroy target artifact or enchantment. Untap up to one target creature you control.

card.name: Perfect Freeze
card.text: Kicker—{U}, Tap an untapped Faerie you control. (You may pay an additional {U} and tap an untapped Faerie you control as you cast this spell.) Tap target creature and put three stun counters on it. If this spell was kicked, put nine stun counters on it instead.

card.name: Spark-Like Flashlight
card.text: (You may cast a legendary instant only if you control a legendary creature or planeswalker.) Target creature gets -X/-0 until end of turn. Tap it. Its controller mills twice X cards.

card.name: Just Dodge It, Bro
card.text: Until end of turn, creatures your opponents control lose hexproof, ward, protection, and indestructible and can't have or gain those abilities.

card.name: Full Focus
card.text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature an opponent controls. If excess damage was dealt this way, create a Treasure token.

card.name: Hell's Tokamak
card.text: Add seven {R}. Spend this mana only to cast legendary spells or activate the abilities of legendary permanents.

card.name: Byakuren, Turbo Rider
card.text: Start your engines! (If you have no speed, it starts at 1. It increases once on each of your turns when an opponent loses life. Max speed is 4.) When Byakuren enters, create a 3/2 colorless Vehicle artifact token with crew 1. Max Speed — Byakuren and Vehicles you control get +2/+2 and have vigilance.

card.name: Yamame, Bright Net in the Dark
card.text: Web-slinging {B}{G} (You may cast this spell for {B}{G} if you also return a tapped creature you control to its owner's hand.) Reach Venom Web — When Yamame enters, put a -1/-1 counter on each tapped creature.

card.name: Gun Sign 「3D Printer Gun」
card.text: {7}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Destroy target permanent. {T}, Remove two loyalty counters from a planeswalker you control, Sacrifice this artifact: Destroy target permanent.

card.name: Mini-Hakkero
card.text: Noncreature spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. {1}, {T}, Discard a card: Draw a card, then exile the top card of your library. Until your next turn, you may play the exiled card.

card.name: Dance of Dazzling Iridescence
card.text: Until end of turn, creatures you control are 4/4 and have flying and vigilance.

card.name: Lyrica, Solo Live // Phantom Noise
card.text:
Flying Lyrica enters with two additional +1/+1 counters on her if a creature you control left the battlefield this turn.
---
Exile target creature you control, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control.

prop.type: Legendary Creature — Spirit Bard // Instant — Adventure

card.name: Yachie, Irresistable Matriarch // From the Rear
card.text:
Flash Whenever one or more creatures deal combat damage to one of your opponents, the attacking player draws a card.
---
Target creature can't be blocked this turn.

prop.type: Legendary Creature — Dragon Turtle Spirit // Instant — Adventure

card.name: Spellbound Volume
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, scry 2. Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: Koishi, Right Behind You // Answer the Phone
card.text:
Deathtouch When Koishi enters, you may discard a card. If you do, she gains haste and shadow until end of turn. (This creature can block or be blocked by only creatures with shadow.)
---
You draw a card and lose 1 life.

card.name: Pichuun!
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if it targets a creature that was dealt damage this turn. Destroy target creature.

card.name: Mob Swarm
card.text: Flying Whenever you attack, amass faeries 1 (Put a +1/+1 counter on an Army you control. It's also a Faerie. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Faerie Army creature token first.)

card.name: Saki, Charging Matriarch // Devilish Beasts
card.text:
Trample Whenever an attacking creature you control dies, Saki deals 1 damage to each opponent.
---
Create a 3/1 red Wolf Spirit creature token with haste and "This creature must attack each combat if able."

prop.type: Legendary Creature — Pegasus Spirit // Sorcery — Adventure

card.name: Follow Me, Unafraid
card.text: Look at the top seven cards of your library. You may cast any number of creature spells from among them. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Suika, Tiny Night Parade // Missing Power
card.text:
When Suika enters, create a 1/1 black and red Youkai creature token for each creature you control with a counter on it.
---
Distribute two +1/+1 counters among one or two target creatures.

card.name: Aerial Combat
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature you control fights target creature you don't control. • Target creature you control deals damage equal to twice its power to target creature you don't control with flying.

card.name: Monstrous Minions
card.text: Changeling (This card is every creature type.) Trample When this creature enters, choose a creature type. Other creatures you control of the chosen type get +1/+1 and have trample.

card.name: Esoterica 「Forgotten Ritual」
card.text: Untap target creature. It gets +3/+3 and gains reach until end of turn.

card.name: Futo, Plate Breaker
card.text: Firebending 2 (Whenever this creature attacks, add {R}{R}. This mana lasts until end of combat.) Boast — {1}: The next Equipment, Aura, or sorcery spell you cast this turn may be cast as though it had flash. When an Equipment you cast this way enters, attach it to target creature you control. (Activate only if this creature attacked this turn and only once each turn.)

card.name: Cirno, Summer Freeze
card.text: Flying Perfect Summer Ice — Whenever Cirno deals combat damage to a player, you may pay {1}. When you do, draw a card, then put a stun counter on up to one target tapped creature.

card.name: Sanae Kochiya
card.text: Flying Gray Thaumaturgy — Whenever Sanae deals combat damage to an opponent, reveal the top card of your library. Put it onto the battlefield tapped if it's a land. Otherwise, you may cast that card and it costs {2} less to cast.

card.name: Miko, Almighty Tao
card.text: Indestructible Whenever Miko attacks, defending player faces a villainous choice — They lose 3 life and discard a card, or you put two +1/+1 counters on Miko and draw a card.

card.name: Flandre, Matara's Ace
card.text: Flying {BR}: Flandre gets +1/+0 until end of turn. Scarlet Nihility — Whenever Flandre deals combat damage to a player, that player sacrifices a permanent with mana value equal to the damage dealt.

card.name: Meiling, Dream Guardian
card.text: Vigilance If noncombat damage would be dealt to Meiling, prevent that damage and put a +1/+1 counter on her.

card.name: Youmu, Half-Phantom
card.text: Vigilance When Youmu enters, you may attach an equipment you control to her. Whenever Youmu deals combat damage while attacking, create a 1/1 white Spirit creature token with flying.

card.name: Sakuya, Perfect and Elegant
card.text: Flash Ricochet Knife — When Sakuya enters, copy target activated or triggered ability. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: For Her Sake
card.text: Surveil 3, then exile the top card of your library. Until your next turn, you may play that card. (To surveil 3, look at the top three cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Spirit Sign 「Fantasy Seal」
card.text: Target player sacrifices an attacking creature of their choice. You gain 4 life.

card.name: Zombie Fairy
card.text: Flying When this creature dies, each opponent loses 2 life. Create a 1/1 white Spirit creature token with flying.

card.name: Fey Inaba
card.text: Flying {4}{W}{W}: Create three 1/1 white Spirit creature tokens with flying. Activate this ability only once.

card.name: Bitch, Get Out Of The Way!
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast while you control an attacking creature. Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand.

card.name: Yuuma, Blood Titan
card.text: Indestructible Whenever Yuuma enters or attacks, create two Blood tokens. (They're artifacts with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.") At the beginning of your end step, you may sacrifice any number of artifacts. You lose X life and put X +1/+1 counters on Yuuma, where X is the number of artifacts sacrificed this way.

card.name: Blood GRM
card.text: {1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.

card.name: Otherworld Observer
card.text: Whenever this creature attacks, you may move a counter from another permanent you control onto this creature.

card.name: Final Spell: Last Word
card.text: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. It gets +5/+5 and gains haste until end of turn. Exile that creature at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Magician's Broom
card.text: Equipped creature has flying, haste, and prowess. Equip {1}

card.name: Urban Legend in Limbo
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Create two 1/1 white Spirit creature tokens with flying. II — Until end of turn, whenever a creature you control attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on it. III — You may reveal a Legendary card you own from outside the game and put it into your hand.

card.name: Hopeless Masquerade
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Until your next turn, creatures you don't control get -2/-0. II — Draw two cards, then discard a card. III — Another target artifact or enchantment you control becomes a 5/5 Spirit creature in addition to its other types.

card.name: Antinomy of Common Flowers
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — You draw 2 cards and lose 2 life. II — Target player discards two cards. III — Each opponent loses X life and you gain X life, where X is the greatest power among creatures you control.

card.name: Scarlet Weather Rhapsody
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — You may discard a card. If you do, draw two cards. II — Add {R}{R}. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end. III — Return up to one card from your graveyard to your hand that's an instant, sorcery, and/or has an Adventure.

card.name: Immaterial and Missing Power
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — You gain 4 life. II — Goad two target creatures. (Until your next turn, those creatures attack each combat if able and attack a player other than you if able.) III — The next creature spell you cast this turn costs {G}.

card.name: Sumireko, Last Occultist
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, you may remove three loyalty counters from Sumireko. When you do, copy that spell and you may choose new targets for the copy. [+1]: Mill two cards, then draw a card. [0]: Exile Sumireko. Return her to the battlefield under her owner's control at the beginning of the next end step. [-5]: Sumireko deals 5 damage to any target. If a permanent dealt damage this way would die this turn, instead exile it and you may cast it for as long as it remains exiled.

card.name: Kasen, the Hermit Sage
card.text: [+2]: Until end of turn, Kasen becomes a 6/6 Demon Mystic creature with indestructible, trample, and haste. (She doesn't lose loyalty while she's not a planeswalker.) [-3]: Exile target nonland permanent. [-5]: You may put a creature card from your hand or graveyard onto the battlefield. It gains indestructible, trample, and haste until end of turn.

card.name: Okina, Sage of Doors
card.text: [+1]: Put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature. It must be blocked this turn if able. [0]: Surveil 3. Create a Blood token. [-7]: Gain control of target creature. It gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Shinki, Ordeal from God
card.text: Whenever you activate a loyalty ability of Shinki, create a 2/2 black Demon creature token with menace. [+1]: Shinki deals 2 damage to any target. [0]: Add three mana in any combination of {R}, {W}, and/or {B}. [-6]: Each opponent sacrifices a creature. Each opponent who can't discards a card. Repeat this process for an artifact and an enchantment.

card.name: Yukari, Sage of Boundaries
card.text: [+1]: You may tap or untap up to one target creature. Draw a card. [-1]: Return target card from your graveyard to your hand. [-7]: Search your library for a permanent card and put it into the battlefield, then shuffle. It gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Spirit GRM
card.text: Flying

card.name: Spirit GRM
card.text: Flying

card.name: Wolf Spirit GRM
card.text: This creature must attack each combat if able.

card.name: Vehicle GRM
card.text: Crew 1 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 1 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Demon GRM
card.text: Menace

card.name: Dreamworld Doppelganger
card.text: When Doppelganger enters, look at the top ten cards of your library. You may reveal a Wizard creature or Sumireko planeswalker card from among them, put it into your hand, and put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. Doppelganger becomes a copy of the revealed card, except it's 3/3 if it's a creature. Put three loyalty counters on it if it's a planeswalker.

card.name: Bumper Crop
card.text: Search your library for a land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Then if you control three or more basic lands, create two Food tokens. (They're artifacts with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")

card.name: Illusionary Dominance
card.text: Target creature gets +3/+1 and gains haste and first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Price of Life
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. If mana from a Treasure was spent to cast this spell, that creature also gains indestructible and lifelink until end of turn.

card.name: Seamless Ceiling of Kinkaku-ji
card.text: Counter target spell if it's an instant, sorcery, or unless its controller pays {1}.

card.name: Poison Nail 「Undead Murderer」
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay X life. Target creature gets -X/-X until end of turn.
